field_iterator_t field_itr ( class_t *  cl,
bool  stat 
)

Returns an iterator for navigating the instance or static fields of a class depending on the value of stat

Parameters:
cl A pointer to a class
stat true if a static field iterator is needed, false otherwise
Returns:
An initialized iterator
